scenarios.scenario: Agent migrating from Zod v3 encounters .merge() deprecation and needs replacement
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's v4 changes cheat sheet shows '.merge() deprecated → use .extend() with destructuring'
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent finds the .merge() → .extend() migration entry and applies destructuring pattern

scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to validate input and get typed output without throwing on invalid data
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's Quick Start shows safeParse() pattern with success check and prettifyError() for formatting
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent uses safeParse() correctly and handles the discriminated union result with type narrowing

scenarios.scenario: Agent is building a library and needs the smallest possible Zod bundle
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's import paths table shows 'zod/mini' as functional, tree-shakable alternative to classic API
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent selects zod/mini import path and understands the trade-off (functional API vs method chaining)
